Stamina.label: Stamina
Stamina.desc: Attack stamina and stamina regen settings.

Posture.label: Posture
Posture.desc: Posture health, posture regen, and guard break settings.

Poise.label: Poise
Poise.desc: Poise health, poise regen, and poise damage settings.

Stagger.label: Stagger
Stagger.desc: Stagger system and recovery time settings.

Block.label: Block
Block.desc: Block, timed block, and block stamina drain settings.

WeaponArt.label: Weapon Art
WeaponArt.desc: Weapon Art system, HUD, and menu position settings.

Execution.label: Execution
Execution.desc: Reserved settings for the currently paused execution module.

Debug.label: Debug
Debug.desc: Currently only a small amount of debug information.

LoadSettings.label: Reload Settings
LoadSettings.desc: Reload settings from Settings.json. This will overwrite any unsaved temporary changes.

SaveSettings.label: Save Settings
SaveSettings.desc: Immediately write the current menu values back to Settings.json.

ResetSettings.label: Reset Settings
ResetSettings.desc: Overwrite the current settings file with defaults and reload.

MenuGeneralSummary.label: This menu only edits scalar settings; weapon and race tables are still maintained in Settings.json.

MenuStaminaSummary.label: Base weapon stamina and creature stamina tables are still maintained in Settings.json.

MenuPostureSummary.label: Base posture and base posture damage tables are still maintained in Settings.json.

MenuPoiseSummary.label: Base poise and base poise damage tables are still maintained in Settings.json.

MenuBlockSummary.label: Per-weapon block strength is still maintained in Settings.json.

MenuExecutionSummary.label: Execution entry is currently paused; posture breaks directly convert to PostureBreak stagger.
MenuExecutionSummary.desc: This is a reserved entry for the execution module and does not mean posture breaks currently lead into execution state.

DebugCrosshairTarget.label: Crosshair Target: {}
DebugCrosshairTarget.desc: The currently targeted actor under the crosshair.

UseAttackStaminaSystem.label: Enable Attack Stamina System
UseAttackStaminaSystem.desc: Controls whether RimCombat takes over stamina consumption for normal attacks, power attacks, swing events, and Precision hits.

ConsumeStaminaOutCombat.label: Consume Stamina Out of Combat
ConsumeStaminaOutCombat.desc: Allow stamina consumption under RimCombat rules even when not in combat.

DisableAttackWhenStaminaZero.label: Disable Attack at Zero Stamina
DisableAttackWhenStaminaZero.desc: When enabled, attacks are blocked when stamina is fully depleted.

StaminaRegenMult.label: Global Stamina Regen Multiplier
StaminaRegenMult.desc: Uniformly scales stamina regeneration speed across all races.

StaminaRegenMin.label: Stamina Regen Minimum
StaminaRegenMin.desc: Lower clamp applied to each race's modified stamina regen.

StaminaRegenMax.label: Stamina Regen Maximum
StaminaRegenMax.desc: Upper clamp applied to each race's modified stamina regen.

StaminaRegenDelay.label: Stamina Regen Delay
StaminaRegenDelay.desc: Delay before stamina regeneration resumes after taking a hit.

StaminaRegenMultCombat.label: Combat Stamina Regen Multiplier
StaminaRegenMultCombat.desc: Stamina regeneration multiplier while in combat.

StaminaRegenMultBlock.label: Blocking Stamina Regen Multiplier
StaminaRegenMultBlock.desc: Stamina regeneration multiplier while holding a block.

AttackStaminaCostPerMass.label: Normal Attack Stamina Cost Per Mass
AttackStaminaCostPerMass.desc: Additional stamina cost per unit of weapon mass for normal attacks.

PowerAttackStaminaCostMult.label: Power Attack Stamina Cost Multiplier
PowerAttackStaminaCostMult.desc: Multiplier applied to base stamina cost for power attacks.

PowerAttackStaminaCostPerMass.label: Power Attack Stamina Cost Per Mass
PowerAttackStaminaCostPerMass.desc: Additional stamina cost per unit of weapon mass for power attacks.

BashStaminaCostMult.label: Bash Stamina Cost Multiplier
BashStaminaCostMult.desc: Multiplier applied to base stamina cost for bashes.

BashStaminaCostPerMass.label: Bash Stamina Cost Per Mass
BashStaminaCostPerMass.desc: Additional stamina cost per unit of weapon mass for bashes.

PowerBashStaminaCostMult.label: Power Bash Stamina Cost Multiplier
PowerBashStaminaCostMult.desc: Multiplier applied to base stamina cost for power bashes.

PowerBashStaminaCostPerMass.label: Power Bash Stamina Cost Per Mass
PowerBashStaminaCostPerMass.desc: Additional stamina cost per unit of weapon mass for power bashes.

UsePostureSystem.label: Enable Posture System
UsePostureSystem.desc: Controls whether posture health, posture damage, guard break, and related HUD are active.

UsePostureHUD.label: Enable Posture HUD
UsePostureHUD.desc: Display the posture bar through TrueHUD when available.

DisablePlayerPostureBreak.label: Disable Player Posture Break
DisablePlayerPostureBreak.desc: When enabled, the player will not trigger posture-break stagger when posture reaches zero.

MaxPostureHealthMult.label: Health to Max Posture Multiplier
MaxPostureHealthMult.desc: How much max posture each point of max health provides.

MaxPostureStaminaMult.label: Stamina to Max Posture Multiplier
MaxPostureStaminaMult.desc: How much max posture each point of max stamina provides.

PostureRegenDelay.label: Posture Regen Delay
PostureRegenDelay.desc: Delay after taking posture damage before posture regeneration begins, in milliseconds.

PostureRegenPercentPerSecond.label: Posture Regen Percent Per Second
PostureRegenPercentPerSecond.desc: Percentage of max posture regenerated per second.

BashPostureDamageMult.label: Bash Posture Damage Multiplier
BashPostureDamageMult.desc: Posture damage multiplier for bash hits.

PowerAttackPostureDamageMult.label: Power Attack Posture Damage Multiplier
PowerAttackPostureDamageMult.desc: Posture damage multiplier for power attack hits.

PowerBashPostureDamageMult.label: Power Bash Posture Damage Multiplier
PowerBashPostureDamageMult.desc: Posture damage multiplier for power bash hits.

ArmorPostureDamageFactor.label: Armor Posture Damage Reduction Factor
ArmorPostureDamageFactor.desc: Coefficient used when armor rating reduces incoming posture damage.

UsePoiseSystem.label: Enable Poise System
UsePoiseSystem.desc: Controls whether poise health, poise regen, and poise threshold checks are active.

PoiseStaminaMult.label: Stamina to Poise Multiplier
PoiseStaminaMult.desc: How much max poise each point of max stamina provides.

PoiseMassMult.label: Mass to Poise Multiplier
PoiseMassMult.desc: How much max poise each unit of character mass provides.

PoiseRegenDelay.label: Poise Regen Delay
PoiseRegenDelay.desc: Delay after taking poise damage before poise regeneration begins, in milliseconds.

PoiseRegenPercentPerSecond.label: Poise Regen Percent Per Second
PoiseRegenPercentPerSecond.desc: Percentage of max poise regenerated per second.

StaggerLevelSmall.label: Small Stagger Threshold
StaggerLevelSmall.desc: Poise damage required to trigger a Small stagger.

StaggerLevelMedium.label: Medium Stagger Threshold
StaggerLevelMedium.desc: Poise damage required to trigger a Medium stagger.

StaggerLevelLarge.label: Large Stagger Threshold
StaggerLevelLarge.desc: Poise damage required to trigger a Large stagger.

LightArmorHeadMaxPoiseBonus.label: Light Armor Head Max Poise Bonus
LightArmorHeadMaxPoiseBonus.desc: Max poise bonus granted by wearing a light armor helmet.

LightArmorBodyMaxPoiseBonus.label: Light Armor Body Max Poise Bonus
LightArmorBodyMaxPoiseBonus.desc: Max poise bonus granted by wearing a light armor cuirass.

LightArmorHandMaxPoiseBonus.label: Light Armor Hand Max Poise Bonus
LightArmorHandMaxPoiseBonus.desc: Max poise bonus granted by wearing light armor gauntlets.

LightArmorFeetMaxPoiseBonus.label: Light Armor Feet Max Poise Bonus
LightArmorFeetMaxPoiseBonus.desc: Max poise bonus granted by wearing light armor boots.

HeavyArmorHeadMaxPoiseBonus.label: Heavy Armor Head Max Poise Bonus
HeavyArmorHeadMaxPoiseBonus.desc: Max poise bonus granted by wearing a heavy armor helmet.

HeavyArmorBodyMaxPoiseBonus.label: Heavy Armor Body Max Poise Bonus
HeavyArmorBodyMaxPoiseBonus.desc: Max poise bonus granted by wearing a heavy armor cuirass.

HeavyArmorHandMaxPoiseBonus.label: Heavy Armor Hand Max Poise Bonus
HeavyArmorHandMaxPoiseBonus.desc: Max poise bonus granted by wearing heavy armor gauntlets.

HeavyArmorFeetMaxPoiseBonus.label: Heavy Armor Feet Max Poise Bonus
HeavyArmorFeetMaxPoiseBonus.desc: Max poise bonus granted by wearing heavy armor boots.

BashPoiseDamageMult.label: Bash Poise Damage Multiplier
BashPoiseDamageMult.desc: Poise damage multiplier for bash hits.

PowerAttackPoiseDamageMult.label: Power Attack Poise Damage Multiplier
PowerAttackPoiseDamageMult.desc: Poise damage multiplier for power attack hits.

PowerBashPoiseDamageMult.label: Power Bash Poise Damage Multiplier
PowerBashPoiseDamageMult.desc: Poise damage multiplier for power bash hits.

LevelDiffAggressorMultPerLevel.label: Level Gap Poise Resistance (Per Level)
LevelDiffAggressorMultPerLevel.desc: Poise damage attenuation factor applied per level the attacker is below the target.

VictimAttackingPoiseBonusPercent.label: Hyper Armor Poise Bonus Percent
VictimAttackingPoiseBonusPercent.desc: Percentage of current weapon poise damage granted as bonus poise while attacking.

UseStaggerSystem.label: Enable Stagger System
UseStaggerSystem.desc: Controls whether RimCombat takes over stagger level and recovery time.

StaggerRecoveryTimeSmall.label: Small Stagger Recovery Time
StaggerRecoveryTimeSmall.desc: Recovery time for Small stagger, in milliseconds.

StaggerRecoveryTimeMedium.label: Medium Stagger Recovery Time
StaggerRecoveryTimeMedium.desc: Recovery time for Medium stagger, in milliseconds.

StaggerRecoveryTimeLarge.label: Large Stagger Recovery Time
StaggerRecoveryTimeLarge.desc: Recovery time for Large stagger, in milliseconds.

UseExhaustedSystem.label: Enable Exhausted System
UseExhaustedSystem.desc: Controls whether the exhausted state and its offensive/defensive penalties are active.

DisablePlayerAttackWhenExhausted.label: Disable Player Attack When Exhausted
DisablePlayerAttackWhenExhausted.desc: When enabled, the player cannot attack while exhausted.

DisableNPCAttackWhenExhausted.label: Disable NPC Attack When Exhausted
DisableNPCAttackWhenExhausted.desc: When enabled, NPCs cannot attack while exhausted.

ExitExhaustedOnHit.label: Exit Exhaustion on Hit
ExitExhaustedOnHit.desc: When enabled, taking a hit helps the actor exit the exhausted state.

ExhaustedExitPercent.label: Exhausted Exit Stamina Percent
ExhaustedExitPercent.desc: Stamina percentage recovered to when exiting the exhausted state.

AttackDamageMultWhenExhausted.label: Attack Damage Multiplier When Exhausted
AttackDamageMultWhenExhausted.desc: Damage multiplier for attacks made while exhausted.

AttackPostureDamageMultWhenExhausted.label: Attack Posture Damage Multiplier When Exhausted
AttackPostureDamageMultWhenExhausted.desc: Posture damage multiplier for attacks made while exhausted.

OnHitDamageMultWhenExhausted.label: Incoming Damage Multiplier When Exhausted
OnHitDamageMultWhenExhausted.desc: Multiplier for damage taken while exhausted.

OnHitPostureDamageMultWhenExhausted.label: Incoming Posture Damage Multiplier When Exhausted
OnHitPostureDamageMultWhenExhausted.desc: Multiplier for posture damage taken while exhausted.

UseBlockSystem.label: Enable Block System
UseBlockSystem.desc: Controls whether RimCombat takes over block damage reduction and block stamina drain.

TimedBlockEnabled.label: Enable Timed Block
TimedBlockEnabled.desc: Controls whether the timed block window and its benefits are active.

TimedBlockNeverPostureBreak.label: Timed Block Posture Break Immunity
TimedBlockNeverPostureBreak.desc: When a timed block is triggered successfully, this hit cannot cause a posture break.

TimedBlockLimit.label: Timed Block Window
TimedBlockLimit.desc: Time from the start of a block during which it still counts as a timed block, in milliseconds.

TimedBlockDuration.label: Timed Block Duration
TimedBlockDuration.desc: How long the timed block's enhanced benefits last after a successful trigger, in milliseconds.

BlockMaxStaminaConsumePercent.label: Max Block Stamina Drain Percent
BlockMaxStaminaConsumePercent.desc: Maximum percent of max stamina a single block can consume.

BlockMinStaminaConsume.label: Block Minimum Stamina Drain
BlockMinStaminaConsume.desc: Base stamina drain applied when stamina is insufficient for a full block.

TimedBlockBlockStrengthMult.label: Timed Block Strength Multiplier
TimedBlockBlockStrengthMult.desc: Additional multiplier applied to block strength during timed block state.

UseWeaponArtSystem.label: Enable Weapon Art System
UseWeaponArtSystem.desc: Controls whether the Weapon Art system, state machine, and payload processing are active.

HideWeaponArtHUDOnSheathe.label: Hide HUD When Sheathed
HideWeaponArtHUDOnSheathe.desc: When enabled, the Weapon Art HUD is hidden while weapons are sheathed.

UseWeaponArtHUD.label: Enable Weapon Art HUD
UseWeaponArtHUD.desc: Controls whether the PrismaUI Weapon Art HUD is displayed.

WeaponArtHUDPosX.label: Weapon Art HUD X Position
WeaponArtHUDPosX.desc: Horizontal screen position of the Weapon Art HUD, in percent.

WeaponArtHUDPosY.label: Weapon Art HUD Y Position
WeaponArtHUDPosY.desc: Vertical screen position of the Weapon Art HUD, in percent.

WeaponArtHUDScale.label: Weapon Art HUD Scale
WeaponArtHUDScale.desc: Overall scale multiplier for the Weapon Art HUD.

WeaponArtMenuStartPercent.label: Weapon Art Menu Start Position
WeaponArtMenuStartPercent.desc: Horizontal starting position of the Weapon Art menu, in screen percent.

SwitchWeaponArtMenu_Purpose.label: Toggle Weapon Art Menu
SwitchWeaponArtMenu_Purpose.desc: Show or hide the Weapon Art menu while the inventory is open.

SwitchWeaponArtHUD_Purpose.label: Toggle Weapon Art State
SwitchWeaponArtHUD_Purpose.desc: Toggle the current Weapon Art between enabled and disabled.

WeaponArtMenuLevel.label: Weapon Art Level
WeaponArtMenuLevel.desc: Current Weapon Art system level display.

WeaponArtMenuCatalog.label: Catalog
WeaponArtMenuCatalog.desc: Title for the Weapon Art list area.

WeaponArtMenuCatalogNote.label: Select a Weapon Art below. The upper area shows the current weapon and the selected art.
WeaponArtMenuCatalogNote.desc: Instruction text for the Weapon Art menu.

WeaponArtMenuNoDescription.label: No description available.
WeaponArtMenuNoDescription.desc: Placeholder text when a Weapon Art has no description.

WeaponArtMenuNoArtsTitle.label: No Weapon Arts Loaded
WeaponArtMenuNoArtsTitle.desc: Title displayed when the Weapon Art list is empty.

WeaponArtMenuNoArtsBody.label: The menu is ready, but the plugin has not sent any Weapon Art data yet.
WeaponArtMenuNoArtsBody.desc: Body text displayed when the Weapon Art list is empty.

WeaponArtMenuCurrentWeapon.label: Current Weapon
WeaponArtMenuCurrentWeapon.desc: Title for the current weapon panel.

WeaponArtMenuNoWeaponSelected.label: No Weapon Selected
WeaponArtMenuNoWeaponSelected.desc: Displayed when no weapon is selected in the inventory.

WeaponArtMenuInventorySelectionRequired.label: Select a weapon in the inventory first

WeaponArtMenuSelectWeaponTitle.label: Please select a weapon in the inventory first
WeaponArtMenuSelectWeaponTitle.desc: Empty state title for the current weapon panel.

WeaponArtMenuSelectWeaponBody.label: The top-left area shows the currently selected weapon, the assigned art, and its assignment status.
WeaponArtMenuSelectWeaponBody.desc: Empty state body for the current weapon panel.

WeaponArtMenuBoundArt.label: Assigned Art
WeaponArtMenuBoundArt.desc: Field name in the current weapon panel.

WeaponArtMenuWeaponType.label: Weapon Type
WeaponArtMenuWeaponType.desc: Field name in the current weapon panel.

WeaponArtMenuWeaponBody.label: If the highlighted art is unlocked and compatible with this weapon, you can assign it here.
WeaponArtMenuWeaponBody.desc: Instruction for the current weapon panel.

WeaponArtMenuNoWeaponArtSelected.label: No Art Selected
WeaponArtMenuNoWeaponArtSelected.desc: Button text when no Weapon Art is highlighted.

WeaponArtMenuSelectedArtAlreadyBound.label: This Art Is Already Assigned
WeaponArtMenuSelectedArtAlreadyBound.desc: Button text when the highlighted art is already assigned to the weapon.

WeaponArtMenuBindAction.label: Assign {}
WeaponArtMenuBindAction.desc: Button text to assign a Weapon Art to the weapon.

WeaponArtMenuUnbindCurrent.label: Remove Current Art
WeaponArtMenuUnbindCurrent.desc: Remove the Weapon Art from the current weapon.

WeaponArtMenuNoWeaponArtBound.label: No Art Currently Assigned
WeaponArtMenuNoWeaponArtBound.desc: Button text when the current weapon has no art assigned.

WeaponArtMenuNoArtSelected.label: No Art Selected
WeaponArtMenuNoArtSelected.desc: Displayed when no art is highlighted.

WeaponArtMenuWaitingTitle.label: Waiting for Weapon Art Data
WeaponArtMenuWaitingTitle.desc: Title for the empty art detail panel.

WeaponArtMenuWaitingBody.label: Once the plugin sends the Weapon Art list, the selected entry will appear here.
WeaponArtMenuWaitingBody.desc: Body for the empty art detail panel.

WeaponArtMenuUnlockLevel.label: Unlock Level
WeaponArtMenuUnlockLevel.desc: Field name in the art detail panel.

WeaponArtMenuPointCost.label: Point Cost
WeaponArtMenuPointCost.desc: Field name in the art detail panel.

WeaponArtMenuActivation.label: Activation Type
WeaponArtMenuActivation.desc: Field name in the art detail panel.

WeaponArtMenuAssignment.label: Assignment Status
WeaponArtMenuAssignment.desc: Field name in the art detail panel.

WeaponArtMenuAvailable.label: Assignable
WeaponArtMenuAvailable.desc: Displayed when the current art can be assigned.

WeaponArtMenuCurrentlyAssigned.label: Currently Assigned
WeaponArtMenuCurrentlyAssigned.desc: Badge text when the art is currently assigned.

WeaponArtMenuUnlocked.label: Unlocked
WeaponArtMenuUnlocked.desc: Badge text when the art is unlocked.

WeaponArtMenuLocked.label: Locked
WeaponArtMenuLocked.desc: Badge text when the art is locked.

WeaponArtMenuLevelBadge.label: Level {}
WeaponArtMenuLevelBadge.desc: Level badge on the art card.

WeaponArtMenuCostBadge.label: Cost {}
WeaponArtMenuCostBadge.desc: Point cost badge on the art card.

WeaponArtMenuPrepare.label: Prepare
WeaponArtMenuPrepare.desc: Weapon Art type that requires preparation.

WeaponArtMenuInstant.label: Instant
WeaponArtMenuInstant.desc: Weapon Art type that fires immediately.

WeaponArtMenuCompatible.label: Compatible
WeaponArtMenuCompatible.desc: The current weapon can use this art.

WeaponArtMenuIncompatible.label: Incompatible
WeaponArtMenuIncompatible.desc: The current weapon cannot use this art.

WeaponArtMenuAssigned.label: Assigned
WeaponArtMenuAssigned.desc: This art is already assigned to the current weapon.

WeaponArtMenuAlreadyUnlocked.label: Already Unlocked
WeaponArtMenuAlreadyUnlocked.desc: Button text when the art is already unlocked.

WeaponArtMenuUnlockAction.label: Unlock Art ({} pts)
WeaponArtMenuUnlockAction.desc: Button text to unlock the art.

WeaponArtMenuAssignedToWeapon.label: Assigned to Weapon
WeaponArtMenuAssignedToWeapon.desc: Button text when the art is assigned to the current weapon.

WeaponArtMenuAssignToSelectedWeapon.label: Assign to Current Weapon
WeaponArtMenuAssignToSelectedWeapon.desc: Button text to assign the art to the selected weapon.

WeaponArtMenuHintSelectArt.label: First select an art from the grid below, then decide whether to assign it to this weapon.
WeaponArtMenuHintSelectArt.desc: Hint when no art is selected.

WeaponArtMenuHintCanBind.label: You can assign {} to this weapon, or remove the current assignment first.
WeaponArtMenuHintCanBind.desc: Hint when the art can be assigned.
